title: philotheca reichenbachii
intro: Philotheca reichenbachii, also known as the Yellow Myrtle, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, native to Western Australia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be attributed to the presence of limonene and other essential oils. The health benefits of Philotheca reichenbachii include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce stress and anxiety, and act as a natural antiseptic to protect against infections. Herbal preparations of Philotheca reichenbachii can be made into teas, infusions, or essential oils for topical use, and are often used to support immune function and overall well-being.
